title: Add initial support for array assignment patterns

features.name: array assignment pattern with single dimension
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array assigned via an assignment pattern with quoted apostrophe syntax

features.name: nested array assignment pattern with multiple dimensions
features.description: Code should include a multi-dimensional unpacked array assigned via nested assignment patterns

features.name: procedural assignment pattern to unpacked array
features.description: Code should include a procedural (initial or always) block assigning an unpacked array via assignment pattern

features.name: continuous assignment with array pattern
features.description: Code should include a continuous assignment (assign statement) using array assignment pattern
